name: result_figures
description: Two spectacular result scene figures, one family: WIN — a jubilant golden trophy-star bursting out of an opened treasure chest with a laurel arc, confetti ribbons and light rays; FAIL — the same chest slammed shut and cracked, the star dimmed and slumped against it, one sad droop, rain-cloud grey palette but still charming.
prompt_extra: storytelling and depth, but ONE clear silhouette per cell that reads at a glance; same design family in both cells
